sources.name: HMRC Overseas Trade — platinum group metals (HS 7110.1x–3x)
sources.note: Monthly per-partner trade in platinum, palladium, and rhodium (unwrought + semi-manufactured forms). Country of Origin from HMRC bulk import files (bdsimp).

sources.name: UK PGM secondary-supply assumption
sources.note: Domestic supply is modelled at ~30% of demand for each PGM. Three UK refiners — Johnson Matthey (Royston), BASF (Cinderford), Heraeus (Royston) — recycle spent autocatalysts. The 30% figure follows industry estimates of UK secondary recovery vs. demand. There is no UK primary mining of PGMs; primary mine supply globally is ~80% concentrated in South Africa and Russia.

sources.name: Voeten — UN General Assembly Voting Data
sources.note: Used to classify each trade partner into an alignment bucket.

monthly.description: Composite monthly UK PGM imports across platinum, palladium, rhodium.

byPartner.description: Per-partner totals summed across platinum, palladium, rhodium.
